description_long: This is a life-sized model of an Emperor Penguin, standing upright on a flat, ice-like base. The bird features a striking black head, back, and flippers, with a white belly and a subtle yellow-orange patch on the upper chest and around the ears. Its beak is long, slender, and slightly curved, with a dark coloration. The legs and feet are short and black, positioned close together beneath the body. The wings are held close to the sides, giving the penguin a streamlined, torpedo-like profile. The surface appears matte with a slight texture, mimicking the look of real feathers.
description: A realistic Emperor Penguin model with black, white, and yellow-orange plumage, standing upright on an ice-like base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the penguin's black back, white belly, and yellow-orange chest patch, with the beak pointing left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid black back, flippers, and the rounded shape of the body and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, beak pointing right, and the flipper and leg details visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the white belly, yellow-orange upper chest, and both feet positioned on the base.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid black back and head, white belly, yellow-orange upper chest and ear patches
